metrics.name: risk_breach_likelihood
metrics.description: Likelihood of a risk breach calculated as the total risk score divided by the total number of vulnerabilities.

metrics.name: risk_breach_score
metrics.description: Calculated risk breach score based on the total risk score, scaled by a factor of 0.1.

metrics.name: breach_risk_score
metrics.formula: CASE WHEN total_misconfigurations > 10 THEN 1.0 WHEN total_external_exposures > 5 THEN 0.75 ELSE 0.5 END
metrics.description: Calculated score indicating the risk of a breach based on misconfigurations and external exposures.

metrics.name: likelihood_score
metrics.formula: CASE WHEN total_devices > 100 THEN 0.9 WHEN total_devices BETWEEN 50 AND 100 THEN 0.7 ELSE 0.3 END
metrics.description: Calculated score indicating the likelihood of an incident based on the number of devices.

metrics.name: exposure_score
metrics.description: Calculated score representing the overall exposure of the asset based on vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, and external risks.

metrics.name: exposure_score
metrics.formula: CASE WHEN total_usage_hours > 0 THEN total_devices_used / total_usage_hours ELSE 0 END
metrics.description: Calculated score representing the exposure of the software based on usage.

dimensions.name: business_unit

dimensions.description: The environment in which the assets are deployed (e.g., production, staging).

dimensions.description: The software stack associated with the assets.

dimensions.description: The name of the software asset.

dimensions.description: The business unit associated with the software asset.

dimensions.description: The environment in which the software asset is deployed (e.g., production, development).

dimensions.name: environment

dimensions.description: The month for which the data is recorded, used for trend analysis.

measures.description: The total number of distinct assets.

measures.description: The total number of distinct vulnerabilities associated with the assets.

measures.description: The total number of distinct exposures associated with the assets.

measures.description: The total number of vulnerabilities associated with the software asset.

measures.name: total_potential_impact
measures.description: The total potential impact value of all exposures.

measures.description: Total risk score calculated for each asset based on associated vulnerabilities.

measures.description: Total score representing the vulnerabilities associated with the asset.
